titleStmt.title: SII 20.129: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 129. (B.K. No. 113 of 1935-36.) KUMAṬGI, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the front wall of the deserted Hanumān temple in the old site of the village.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 6, Plavaṁga, Chaitra, ba. 1, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1187, March 26, Thursday, f.d.t. ·08.

The inscription records that the image of god Chenna-Brahmēśvara was reconsecrated and a gift of land was made for the deity by the Mahājanas, Mūliga, Eṇṭu-Hiṭṭu and others headed by Sōmaya of the agrahāra of Kummaṭage.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī vāgartthāviva saṁpruktau vāgārthapratipattae jagataḥpitarau vaṁ
dē . pārvvatīparamēśvarau . svasti śrīmatu
cāḷukyacakravartti tṟibhuvanamalla sōmēśvaradēvavarṣada 6
neya plavaṁga saṁvatsarada caitra ba 1 brihaspativāradaṁdu śrī
matu sarvvanamasyadagrahāraṁ kummaṭageya Aśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu
prabhu mūliga yeṁṭu hiṭṭu haḷkada nāgayaṁgaḷa maga sōma
ya mukhyavāgi ceṁnnabrahmēsvaradēvara punaḻ�tiṣṭeyaṁ mā
ḍi yā dēvara Aṁgabhōga caitrapavitrakke pūrvvadiṁ baṁdu gauḍa
biṭṭa keyi kuṟuṁbageyiṁ baḍagalu koṁniṭageya sīmeyiṁ
mūḍalu māṇikēśvarada kōlalu keyi mattaru 62 gauḍa maneyiṁ
baḍagalu Āṟugeyiyagalada haṁni keyi nīḻada mane
mattarige hāga maṭhada Āntā sthānadācā
ryyaṟuvaṁ © prabhumatta dēvara cintāyava maduva
dhārāpūrvvakavāgi hiṭṭu husi koṭṭaru . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā da
ttā rājabhiḥ . sagarādibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmista
sya tasya tadā phalaṁ . sivāya namaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.129 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
